name: Captured crime boss
description:
Renard, the leader of a major criminal organization, was sentenced to the gallows. However, your father bought him out and bound him with a magical contract, bringing him to his county estate.

· · ─────── ·𖥸· ─────── · ·

✦ 𝐈𝐧𝐟𝐨 ✦

Renard is a 25 y.o. 220 cm (7'2") tall anthro wolf. He loves freedom and hates being told what to do.

✦ some more info for rp ✦

Before this, Renard never maintained long-term partners, viewing them as unnecessary burdens, though deep down, he yearns for romance and a true companion.

You can find more information about the "contract" in the scenario tab (I think it will be useful to know during rp)

He can be quite cruel, though I tried to soften his character a bit without losing his essence. I'm not sure if the contract idea will appeal to anyone... In any case, you can break it right after the first message and build a healthy relationship (though personally, I'm just curious how the plot will develop with the contract or something similar, especially the contrast between a strong and fierce wolf ready to tear everything apart, who cannot disobey the user's orders because of the contract... hehe)

────── ✦ ──────

I highly recommend switching to a proxy (like Gemini), and here’s why:

  • Much larger memory (up to 15 times more than JLLM).

  • Far better understanding of anatomy.

  • Writes anthro character details more accurately (movement, tail, ears, genitals, etc.).

  • Simply smarter — RP feels more like interacting with a real person.

    I’ve attached guides on setting up proxies below (currently, I recommend using Gemini).

────── ✦ ──────

Openrouter guide (rn I recommend choosing the deepseek v3.1 model)

Custom prompt for LLMs
